line_1: By age ennobled, whilst the hurricane,
line_2: That raves resistless o'er the ravaged plain,

line_1: When winds, as of a rushing hurricane,
line_2: Shook the tall windows of the towered fane; —
Till thou see'st those scenes again,

line_1: That Nothern Mist forebodes a Hurricane.
line_2: WHat cheer my Mates? Luff ho! We Toil in Vain!

line_1: Guide, like a god, the battle's hurricane;
line_2: May other Nelsons, on the sanguine main,
Our boist'rous Passions Rouze the sleeping Main?
